title: Ultimate Tic Tac Toe Game

requirements.text: Create a Home page with the title 'Ultimate Tic Tac Toe' and two mode-selection buttons: 'Single Player (Play vs Computer)' and 'Two Player (Play with Friend)'.

quotes: Home page with: Title: 'Ultimate Tic Tac Toe', Two buttons: Single Player (Play vs Computer), Two Player (Play with Friend)

acceptanceCriteria: Home page displays the title 'Ultimate Tic Tac Toe'
Two buttons are visible: 'Single Player' and 'Two Player'
Clicking each button navigates to the respective game mode

requirements.text: Implement a 3x3 Tic Tac Toe game grid with win and draw detection, a Restart button, and visual highlighting of winning cells with smooth animations.
acceptanceCriteria: 3x3 grid renders and accepts player moves
Winning combination cells are visually highlighted
Draw state is detected and announced when all cells are filled with no winner
Restart button resets the board and current-game state
Cell placement and winning highlight have smooth CSS transitions/animations

requirements.text: Implement Single Player mode where the computer automatically makes random moves as Player O after the human Player X places a mark.

quotes: Single Player mode with random AI moves

acceptanceCriteria: After the human places a mark, the computer selects a random available cell and places its mark
Computer does not move on a already-occupied cell
Win/draw detection works correctly for both human and computer moves

requirements.text: Implement Two Player mode allowing two human players to take turns on the same device, alternating between Player X and Player O.
acceptanceCriteria: Players alternate turns between X and O
Current player's turn is clearly indicated on screen
Win/draw detection works correctly for both players

requirements.text: Display a session-only scoreboard tracking wins for Player X and Player O (or Computer in Single Player mode). Scores accumulate across rounds within the session and reset on page refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: Scoreboard shows win counts for both players/computer
Scores increment correctly after each game concludes
Scores reset to zero on page refresh (no localStorage persistence)

requirements.text: Apply a modern dark theme with neon blue and purple glow effects, smooth hover effects on interactive elements, and a fully mobile-responsive layout.

quotes: Neon blue and purple glow effects

acceptanceCriteria: Background is dark (near-black or very dark gray)
Interactive elements (buttons, grid cells) display neon blue and/or purple glow on hover and focus
Layout adapts cleanly to mobile screen sizes (320px and up)
Hover transitions are smooth (CSS transition applied)

constraints: Scoreboard must be session-only — do not persist scores to localStorage or any backend storage.
AI must use random move selection only — no minimax or advanced algorithms.
